news_top_5.headline: US and Iran confirm peace deal; stocks soar, oil -3.8% to $81.65 as Strait of Hormuz to reopen
news_top_5.summary: Washington and Tehran confirmed peace deal Sunday PM, triggering global risk rally. Asia +3-5%, ES futures +1%, Nasdaq futures +1.8%; WTI crude -3.8% to $81.65 (3-month low).

news_top_5.headline: Inflation Worries Keep Markets Wary Even After Iran Peace Deal
news_top_5.summary: Strategists at KCM Trade, Pepperstone, Stifel call deal a short-term trade not a trend change. Unresolved ~4 months of conflict economic fallout still weighs on inflation.

news_top_5.headline: US Futures Hold Surge after Iran Ceasefire; bonds rally, gold eases to $4,165
news_top_5.summary: ES futures held ~+1% overnight; 10Y yield fell ~4bp from 4.53% to 4.49%; gold eased from $4,200 to $4,165 on reduced geo risk premium. DXY flat at 99.81.

news_top_5.headline: Markets celebrate U.S.-Iran deal; Trump says 'oil will flow,' Strait of Hormuz reopens
news_top_5.summary: Deal removes ~4-month geopolitical oil supply risk premium. WTI at 3-month low; lower oil supports reduced inflation expectations, net dovish for Fed.

news_top_5.headline: Nikkei +5.5%, Kospi +5.7%, MSCI Asia Pacific +3.2% — global risk sweep confirms peace deal
news_top_5.summary: Massive Asia open magnitude (+3-5%) confirms peace deal is priced as genuine macro catalyst, not rumor. Scale suggests multi-session unwind of geo risk premium.

catalysts_in_session.name: US-Iran Peace Deal — gap-open repricing, first-bar volatility HIGH

risk_regime_call.reasoning: US-Iran peace deal confirmed Sunday drives global relief rally — ES +1%, Nasdaq +1.8%, Asia +3-5%, oil -3.8%, yields -4bp. However Bloomberg and multi-strategist consensus warns this is a short-term trade not a trend change; unresolved inflation from 4-month conflict caps conviction. If SPY opens above Friday close with EMA stack intact, bias is consistent with risk_on continuation; gap-fade risk on intraday reversal after initial reprice.

overnight_session_summary.note: Overnight context only — pre-open. Peace deal confirmed Sunday PM. Regime INVERTED vs last scout (2026-06-08 risk_off on Iran military exchange).
